name: gemm_n8192_k8192
description: General matrix multiply (GEMM) C = A @ B.T. Captured from Llama 3.1/3.3 70B attn.o_proj (hidden=8192 → hidden=8192).

M.description: Number of output rows (total number of tokens).

B.description: Right matrix operand (transposed in the matmul).

reference:
import torch

def run(A, B):
    C = torch.matmul(A, B.T)
    return C
